escalation.rationale: Israel and Iran exchanged direct missile strikes despite Trump pressure, breaking April ceasefire and threatening broader regional war.

ticker_items: Israel strikes Iran military targets after Iranian missile attack
Trump reportedly calls Netanyahu 'fucking crazy' demanding ceasefire
China's Xi arrives in Pyongyang for rare state visit
Oil prices spike 3.29% to $96.15 as Middle East strikes escalate
Houthis declare complete ban on Israeli shipping in Red Sea

middle_east.description: Israeli airstrikes on Iranian military targets following Iranian missile attack.
Iranian missile barrage targeting Israeli territory prompting retaliatory strikes.
Israeli retaliatory attack against Hezbollah positions in Beirut suburbs.
Israeli attacks killed at least 10 people despite months-old truce with Hamas.

russia.text: We see no point in meeting his Ukrainian counterpart Volodymyr Zelensky until a peace deal is ready
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: Russian President

middle_east.text: You're fucking crazy. You'd be in prison if not for me
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: President Xi Jinping arrived in Pyongyang for his first North Korea visit in seven years, seeking to reassert Chinese influence over Kim Jong Un. The rare state visit comes after hosting summits with Trump and Putin, positioning China as a key mediator in regional tensions.

President Trump reportedly demanded Israeli ceasefire with Hezbollah in heated call with Netanyahu, calling the PM 'fucking crazy' as administration attempts to contain Middle East escalation. Trump's diplomatic efforts appear unsuccessful as Israel proceeded with strikes against Iran despite US pressure.

financial.notes: Oil prices spiked 3.29% to $96.15 per barrel as Israel-Iran exchange triggered market fears of broader Middle East conflict.

update_log.text: Houthis declare complete ban on Israeli shipping in Red Sea following missile attack on Israel
Oil markets surge as Israel-Iran strikes threaten regional stability and shipping routes
Israel launches airstrikes on central and western Iran following Iranian missile barrage
Iranian missiles target central Israel in most serious escalation since April ceasefire
Chinese President Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang for first North Korea visit since 2019
